---
title: "Lady Harriet Jane Herbert"
---

## Lady Harriet Jane Herbert

**Dates:** (1831/2-1880)

### Description

church worker

### Biography

Sister of Lady Lucy Herbert, she raised money so that church bells should ring for the first time in Auckland, New Zealand.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 23d [after 1865]
- Letter from March 5th [1862[[footnote:2]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
